sentiment.reasoning: Strong demand and a raised outlook are clear positive indicators for financial performance.

headlines.headline: Pleven Trading Co to host investor day focused on cloud infrastructure strategy

headlines.headline: Varvov Retail Group Chief Strategy Officer addresses investor concerns in open letter

sentiment.reasoning: An open letter from the CSO is a reactive communication attempt that does not change underlying fundamentals.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
